title: ScytheMod
description: Scythe Mod adds powerful endgame scythes with unique combat mechanics, active abilities, special right-click skills, HUD timers, custom progression, and dark fantasy-style gameplay for both survival and PvP.
body:
# Scythe Mod

**Scythe Mod** adds powerful endgame scythes with unique combat mechanics, active abilities, special right-click skills, HUD timers, custom progression, and dark fantasy-style gameplay for both survival and PvP.

This is not just a weapon pack. Each scythe has its own playstyle, resource loop, cooldowns, risks, and combat identity.

## Features

### Bloody Scythe

A cursed melee weapon built around pressure, sustain, and finishing marked targets.

* Inflicts **Bleeding**, a custom damage-over-time effect.
* Bleeding deals true damage and ignores normal defenses.
* Has a chance to heal the wielder through **Vampirism**.
* Can partially pierce enemy damage mitigation.
* **Right Click — Blender**
  Pulls nearby hostile targets toward you, damages them, slows them, and applies Bleeding.
* **Scythe Ability Key — Blood Harvest**
  Marks nearby enemy players for a limited time. Kill during the harvest window to gain powerful temporary buffs. Fail the harvest and you are punished with debuffs.

### Toxic Scythe

An anti-armor scythe focused on poison, durability damage, and area denial.

* Basic attacks can damage the target’s entire armor set.
* Basic attacks can apply **Poison II**.
* **Right Click — Toxic Orb**
  Launches a projectile that bursts on impact, deals armor-piercing damage, applies poison, and damages armor.
* **Scythe Ability Key — Toxic Aura**
  Creates a short-duration aura that poisons nearby enemies, damages armor over time, and can trigger extra armor-piercing damage or nausea.

### Withering Scythe

A necromantic scythe built around soul harvesting, minions, and wither pressure.

* Basic attacks can apply **Wither II**.
* Killing mobs stores souls.
* Killing players stores more souls.
* **Right Click — Summon Minion**
  Spends souls and durability to summon a wither-skeleton minion.
* Minions follow and defend their owner.
* Minions can regenerate by consuming durability from the owner’s scythe.
* **Shift + Right Click** dismisses your summoned minions.
* **Scythe Ability Key — Withering Aura**
  Applies Wither to nearby enemies and buffs your minions with Strength and Speed.

## Controls

* **Right Click** while holding a scythe: use that scythe’s special ability.
* **Scythe Ability Key** default: **R**.
* **Hold Shift** on a scythe tooltip to see detailed ability descriptions.
* **Hold Alt** while viewing the tooltip to see numeric stats.

## Progression

The mod includes custom progression built around crafting, rare materials, and mastery challenges.

* Bloody Essence
* Toxic Essence
* Withering Essence
* Custom scythe crafting recipes
* Custom advancements for crafting, collecting materials, using abilities, summoning minions, and mastering every scythe

## Compatibility

* Includes optional **JEI** support.
* Includes English and Russian localization.
* Includes fully **Combat Extended** support.

## Requirements

* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API
* A compatible Minecraft version listed on the downloaded file
